## Overview

Magnetic Email Marketing System and Toolkit √© o sistema completo de email marketing da GKIC, apresentado por Dave Dee (Chief Marketing Driver) com Dan Kennedy como co-host e consultor principal. O programa ensina desde captura de emails at√© monetiza√ß√£o atrav√©s de campanhas automatizadas.

Inclui o sub-programa **Instant Cash Flow Surge Generator** (3-step email system para gerar caixa imediato da lista existente).

## Structure

### Core Program (Sessions 1-4)
| Session | Topic | Key Frameworks |
|---------|-------|----------------|
| 1 ‚Äî Collection | Lead gen, email capture, LGMs | Lead Generation Magnet, Threshold of Exchange, Cookie-Food-Meal |
| 2 ‚Äî Attention | Subject lines, open rates | 7 Subject Line Types, Intriguing Question, Relationship Trumps Cleverness |
| 3 ‚Äî Conversion | Follow-up sequences, email types | Sequential Agreement, Short Intense + Maintenance Forever, 7 Email Types |
| 4 ‚Äî Monetization | Campaign types, holiday promos, cash flow | Calendar as Campaign Generator, Cash Flow Surge, Direct Response vs Image |

### Sub-Program: Instant Cash Flow Surge Generator
- 3-Day Email System (Day 1: Offer, Day 2: Resell, Day 3: Urgency+Deadline)
- GKIC made $250K+ from 5 templates using this system
- Can convert to direct mail (subject‚Üíheadline, body‚Üíletter, CTA‚Üíorder form)
